title: https://github.com/BrotherSupport/ai_consultant
acceptance_criteria: Codebase is refactored to improve readability and maintainability without altering existing functionality.
All existing tests pass successfully after the refactor.
No performance degradation is observed post-refactor.
Code adheres to the project's style guidelines as defined in scalastyle-config.xml.
technical_notes: Focus on simplifying complex methods and reducing code duplication. Pay attention to the dependency management in pom.xml to ensure no unnecessary dependencies are included. Consider using the pre-commit hooks defined in .pre-commit-config.yaml to catch any style issues early. Be cautious of any changes that might affect the public API or backward compatibility.

title: add e2e test
acceptance_criteria: The end-to-end test should cover a complete workflow from data ingestion to result output using Spark's APIs.
The test should be executable in the current CI/CD pipeline without manual intervention.
The test should validate the integration of Spark SQL, MLlib, and Structured Streaming components.
The test should pass consistently across supported environments (Scala, Java, Python).
technical_notes: Consider using the existing test frameworks and utilities provided in the repository to ensure consistency with current testing practices. Pay attention to the setup and teardown processes to avoid resource leaks. Ensure that the test is isolated and does not depend on external systems or data. Utilize mock data where applicable to simulate real-world scenarios.
validation_notes: The ticket is well-structured with specific acceptance criteria, plausible related files, actionable technical notes, and includes change references.

title: add new UI for spark stream
acceptance_criteria: The new UI for Spark Streaming is accessible from the main dashboard.
The UI displays real-time data metrics such as throughput, latency, and error rates.
Users can filter and sort streaming data by various parameters.
The UI is responsive and works across different screen sizes.
All new UI components pass accessibility checks and are compliant with WCAG standards.
Unit and integration tests cover at least 90% of the new UI code.
technical_notes: Consider leveraging existing components from the Spark UI framework to maintain consistency. Pay attention to the performance impact of real-time data updates on the UI. Ensure that the UI can handle large volumes of streaming data without significant lag. Be mindful of the security implications of exposing streaming data metrics.
validation_notes: The ticket is well-structured with specific acceptance criteria, plausible related files, actionable technical notes, and includes change references.
